repo.description: LIO-SAM: Tightly-coupled Lidar Inertial Odometry via Smoothing and Mapping

terms.context_snippet: **A real-time lidar-inertial odometry package. We strongly recommend the users read this document thoroughly and test the package with the provided dataset first. A video of the demonstration of the method can be found on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=A0H8CoORZJU).**
